problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
